SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05

COMM. CATHERINE LYONS, BETH WILBER - CLERK, DIANA PADILLA - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DOUGLAS W. HOLT APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, DEFT. RUSSELL FOWLER APPEARING IN PRO PER. PARTIES ALL AGREED TO CONTINUE SETT. CONF. TO DAY OF TRIAL, TO WORK ON PLACING DEFT. IN A TREATMENT PROGRAM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOWLER, RUSSELL (SUED AS RUSSEL) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1594 MARKET STREET, NO 203, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $499.29 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $499.29, STAYED UNTIL NOV-16-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
